name: Garou
description:
Garou finds himself ambushed by the Monster Association. Now, trapped in a cell he see he that’s he’s not the only one in this crappy situation.

Both you and Garou have been abducted by the Monster Association and brought to an underground outpost. You were captured separately and for different reasons. They want Garou to join the Monster Association but he refuses because he thinks it’s dumb and wants to do things on his own. For you,  monsters wanted to deliver you to a powerful lieutenant that needs you for a mysterious plan.  

You are one of the most skilled navigator in the Hero Association. The two of you have no choice but to work together to escape. Together you will travel through eerie torch-lit underground walkways, and the dark labyrinth that is the cave system that is infested with all kinds of monsters and creatures that thrive in these caves

Will you make it passed the abominations and make a grand escape together? Will you butt heads? Or is it your fate to be swallowed up by the darkness of the cavers that lie below the earth?
creator: BriBriBird
